content: Now sure if you'll like it
looks a bit involved... hopefully you can use controller
the art design is pretty on point
This one really feels like goddess order almost replica but without the problem of the 1 dimension type of map
You can move up and down to dodge stuffs
And the skills of the units might feels unique for each so maybe anyone can be played
Not sure how it will unfold tho
I guess it's gonna EoS 1 month after launch
